toolUseResult.originalFile:
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Agentic Control Plane API
  version: 0.2.0
  summary: Policy, approval, execution, and audit APIs for governed agent actions
  description: |
    v0.2 extends the base control-plane lifecycle with richer, domain-specific schemas for:
      - Git and pull request actions
      - Deploy and cloud actions
      - Email and calendar actions
      - Payment and procurement actions

    Core lifecycle:
      intent -> policy decision -> approval (optional) -> execution grant -> execution -> trace

servers:
  - url: https://api.agentic-control-plane.example.com
    description: Production
  - url: https://sandbox.agentic-control-plane.example.com
    description: Sandbox

security:
  - bearerAuth: []

tags:
  - name: Intents
  - name: Approvals
  - name: Policies
  - name: Connectors
  - name: Executions
  - name: Funding Sources
  - name: Credentials
  - name: Traces
  - name: Analytics
  - name: Health

paths:
  /v1/health:
    get:
      tags: [Health]
      summary: Get service health
      operationId: getHealth
      security: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Service health
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HealthResponse"

  /v1/intents:
    post:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: Submit a new action intent
      operationId: createIntent
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateIntentRequest"
            examples:
              gitPullRequest:
                summary: Create a pull request
                value:
                  idempotency_key: "REDACTED"
                  agent_id: "agt_codex_repo_alpha"
                  workspace_id: "ws_engineering"
                  action:
                    type: "git.pull_request.create"
                    summary: "Open PR from feature branch to main"
                    justification: "Ship checkout bug fix"
                    target:
                      kind: "repository"
                      id: "repo_checkout"
                      display_name: "github.com/acme/checkout"
                    domain:
                      git:
                        provider: "github"
                        repository: "acme/checkout"
                        branch: "fix/checkout-tax-rounding"
                        base_branch: "main"
                        commit_shas:
                          - "abc1234"
                        files_changed:
                          - "src/tax.ts"
                          - "tests/tax.test.ts"
                        pr_title: "Fix tax rounding on checkout"
                        pr_body: "This PR fixes checkout tax rounding and adds regression tests."
                        labels: ["bugfix", "checkout"]
                  context:
                    environment: "production"
                    source_platform: "codex"
              paymentPurchase:
                summary: Purchase SaaS subscription
                value:
                  idempotency_key: "REDACTED"
                  agent_id: "agt_procurement_ops"
                  workspace_id: "ws_finops"
                  action:
                    type: "payment.charge"
                    summary: "Purchase annual Figma license"
                    justification: "Renew expiring seat for jane@company.com"
                    target:
                      kind: "vendor"
                      id: "vendor_figma"
                      display_name: "Figma"
                    domain:
                      payment:
                        vendor_name: "Figma"
                        amount:
                          amount: 18000
                          currency: "USD"
                        merchant_category: "software"
                        budget_code: "design-software"
                        funding_source_id: "fs_team_software"
                        payment_instrument_preference: "virtual_card"
                        line_items:
                          - description: "Figma Pro Annual"
                            quantity: 1
                            unit_amount:
                              amount: 18000
                              currency: "USD"
                        beneficiary:
                          email: "jane@company.com"
                  context:
                    environment: "production"
                    source_platform: "openclaw"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Intent created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"

    get:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: List intents
      operationId: listIntents
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageSize"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageToken"
        - name: workspace_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        - name: action_type
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: agent_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Paginated intents
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentListResponse"

  /v1/intents/{intent_id}:
    get:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: Get an intent
      operationId: getIntent
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/IntentId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Intent details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"

  /v1/intents/{intent_id}/evidence:
    post:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: Attach evidence to an intent
      operationId: appendIntentEvidence
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/IntentId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/AppendEvidenceRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Evidence appended
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"

  /v1/approvals:
    get:
      tags: [Approvals]
      summary: List approval requests
      operationId: listApprovals
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageSize"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageToken"
        - name: assignee
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Approval queue
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalListResponse"

  /v1/approvals/{approval_id}:
    get:
      tags: [Approvals]
      summary: Get an approval request
      operationId: getApproval
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/ApprovalId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Approval details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Approval"

  /v1/approvals/{approval_id}/approve:
    post:
      tags: [Approvals]
      summary: Approve an action
      operationId: approveRequest
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/ApprovalId"
      requestBody:
        required: false
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApproveRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Approval recorded
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalActionResponse"

  /v1/approvals/{approval_id}/deny:
    post:
      tags: [Approvals]
      summary: Deny an action
      operationId: denyRequest
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/ApprovalId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/DenyRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Denial recorded
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalActionResponse"

  /v1/approvals/{approval_id}/modify:
    post:
      tags: [Approvals]
      summary: Approve with modifications
      operationId: modifyRequest
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/ApprovalId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ModifyApprovalRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Modification recorded
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalActionResponse"

  /v1/policies:
    get:
      tags: [Policies]
      summary: List policies
      operationId: listPolicies
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageSize"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageToken"
        - name: workspace_id
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Policies
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyListResponse"

    post:
      tags: [Policies]
      summary: Create a policy
      operationId: createPolicy
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreatePolicyRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Policy created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Policy"

  /v1/policies/{policy_id}:
    get:
      tags: [Policies]
      summary: Get a policy
      operationId: getPolicy
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PolicyId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Policy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Policy"

    patch:
      tags: [Policies]
      summary: Update a policy
      operationId: updatePolicy
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PolicyId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdatePolicyRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Policy updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Policy"

  /v1/policies/simulate:
    post:
      tags: [Policies]
      summary: Simulate policy evaluation
      operationId: simulatePolicy
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicySimulationRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Simulation result
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicySimulationResponse"

  /v1/connectors:
    get:
      tags: [Connectors]
      summary: List connectors
      operationId: listConnectors
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageSize"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageToken"
        - name: workspace_id
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Connectors
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorListResponse"

    post:
      tags: [Connectors]
      summary: Register a connector
      operationId: createConnector
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateConnectorRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Connector created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Connector"

  /v1/connectors/{connector_id}:
    get:
      tags: [Connectors]
      summary: Get a connector
      operationId: getConnector
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/ConnectorId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Connector details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Connector"

    patch:
      tags: [Connectors]
      summary: Update a connector
      operationId: updateConnector
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/ConnectorId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdateConnectorRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Connector updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Connector"

  /v1/execution-grants/{grant_id}:
    get:
      tags: [Executions]
      summary: Get an execution grant
      operationId: getExecutionGrant
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/GrantId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Execution grant
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExecutionGrant"

  /v1/executions/run:
    post:
      tags: [Executions]
      summary: Execute an approved action
      operationId: runExecution
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExecutionRunRequest"
      responses:
        "202":
          description: Execution accepted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExecutionRunResponse"

  /v1/executions/{execution_id}:
    get:
      tags: [Executions]
      summary: Get execution status
      operationId: getExecution
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/ExecutionId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Execution details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Execution"

  /v1/executions/{execution_id}/callback:
    post:
      tags: [Executions]
      summary: Post execution callback
      operationId: executionCallback
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/ExecutionId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExecutionCallbackRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Callback recorded
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Execution"

  /v1/funding-sources:
    get:
      tags: [Funding Sources]
      summary: List funding sources
      operationId: listFundingSources
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageSize"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageToken"
        - name: workspace_id
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Funding sources
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/FundingSourceListResponse"

    post:
      tags: [Funding Sources]
      summary: Create a funding source
      operationId: createFundingSource
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateFundingSourceRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Funding source created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/FundingSource"

  /v1/credentials:
    get:
      tags: [Credentials]
      summary: List credential references
      operationId: listCredentials
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageSize"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageToken"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Credentials
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CredentialListResponse"

    post:
      tags: [Credentials]
      summary: Register a credential reference
      operationId: createCredential
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateCredentialRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Credential created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CredentialReference"

  /v1/traces:
    get:
      tags: [Traces]
      summary: List traces
      operationId: listTraces
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageSize"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageToken"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Traces
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TraceListResponse"

  /v1/analytics/summary:
    get:
      tags: [Analytics]
      summary: Get analytics summary
      operationId: getAnalyticsSummary
      parameters:
        - name: workspace_id
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: from
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date-time
        - name: to
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date-time
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Analytics summary
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AnalyticsSummary"

components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT

  parameters:
    IntentId:
      name: intent_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ApprovalId:
      name: approval_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PolicyId:
      name: policy_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ConnectorId:
      name: connector_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    GrantId:
      name: grant_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ExecutionId:
      name: execution_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PageSize:
      name: page_size
      in: query
      schema:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 200
        default: 50
    PageToken:
      name: page_token
      in: query
      schema:
        type: string

  schemas:
    HealthResponse:
      type: object
      required: [status, service, version, timestamp]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [ok, degraded, down]
        service:
          type: string
        version:
          type: string
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Error:
      type: object
      required: [error]
      properties:
        error:
          type: object
          required: [code, message]
          properties:
            code: { type: string }
            message: { type: string }
            details:
              type: array
              items:
                type: object
                additionalProperties: true
            request_id: { type: string }

    Pagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        next_page_token:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    IntentStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending_policy, pending_approval, approved, denied, executing, succeeded, failed, cancelled, expired]

    ApprovalStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending, approved, denied, modified, delegated, expired, cancelled]

    PolicyStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [draft, active, archived]

    ConnectorType:
      type: string
      enum: [payments, source_control, cloud, deployment, email, calendar, ticketing, crm, erp, secret_manager, internal_api, custom]

    RiskLevel:
      type: string
      enum: [low, medium, high, critical]

    DecisionDisposition:
      type: string
      enum: [allow, allow_modified, require_approval, deny, require_more_evidence]

    ActorRef:
      type: object
      required: [id, type]
      properties:
        id: { type: string }
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [agent, human, service, connector_runtime]
        display_name: { type: string }

    ActionTarget:
      type: object
      required: [kind]
      properties:
        kind:
          type: string
          enum: [vendor, repository, environment, api, secret, calendar, email_recipient, ticket, cloud_resource, custom]
        id: { type: string }
        display_name: { type: string }

    Money:
      type: object
      required: [amount, currency]
      properties:
        amount:
          type: integer
          description: Amount in minor units
          minimum: 0
        currency:
          type: string
          minLength: 3
          maxLength: 3

    Recipient:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email

    AttachmentRef:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        mime_type: { type: string }
        url: { type: string, format: uri }
        storage_ref: { type: string }

    CalendarAttendee:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        optional:
          type: boolean
          default: false

    LineItem:
      type: object
      required: [description, quantity, unit_amount]
      properties:
        description:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
        unit_amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        sku:
          type: string

    GitAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [github, gitlab, bitbucket, custom]
        repository:
          type: string
        branch:
          type: string
        base_branch:
          type: string
        commit_shas:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        files_changed:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        pr_title:
          type: string
        pr_body:
          type: string
        labels:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        reviewers:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        checks_required:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    DeployAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [kubernetes, vercel, netlify, aws, gcp, azure, flyio, custom]
        service:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        artifact_ref:
          type: string
        image_ref:
          type: string
        cluster:
          type: string
        namespace:
          type: string
        strategy:
          type: string
          enum: [rolling, blue_green, canary, replace, custom]
        rollback_supported:
          type: boolean
        change_ticket_id:
          type: string
        maintenance_window_id:
          type: string

    CloudAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [aws, gcp, azure, cloudflare, custom]
        account_id:
          type: string
        region:
          type: string
        resource_type:
          type: string
        resource_id:
          type: string
        operation:
          type: string
        estimated_cost:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        tags:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: string

    EmailAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        from:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        to:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        cc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        bcc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        subject:
          type: string
        body_text:
          type: string
        body_html:
          type: string
        attachments:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/AttachmentRef"
        thread_ref:
          type: string
        send_mode:
          type: string
          enum: [send_now, draft_only]

    CalendarAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [google_calendar, outlook, custom]
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        attendees:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAttendee"
        start_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        end_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        timezone:
          type: string
        location:
          type: string
        conference_type:
          type: string
          enum: [none, google_meet, zoom, teams, custom]
        calendar_id:
          type: string
        visibility:
          type: string
          enum: [default, public, private]

    PaymentBeneficiary:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        department: { type: string }

    PaymentAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        vendor_id:
          type: string
        amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        merchant_category:
          type: string
        budget_code:
          type: string
        funding_source_id:
          type: string
        payment_instrument_preference:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card, ach, wallet, network_proxy, unspecified]
        beneficiary:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentBeneficiary"
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"
        renewal:
          type: boolean
        contract_term:
          type: string
        recurring_interval:
          type: string
          enum: [none, monthly, quarterly, annual]
        merchant_reference:
          type: string

    ProcurementAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        request_type:
          type: string
          enum: [software, travel, equipment, contractor, services, other]
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        amount_estimate:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        justification:
          type: string
        requestor:
          type: string
        cost_center:
          type: string
        legal_review_required:
          type: boolean
        security_review_required:
          type: boolean
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"

    DomainAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        git:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/GitAction"
        deploy:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeployAction"
        cloud:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CloudAction"
        email:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/EmailAction"
        calendar:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAction"
        payment:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentAction"
        procurement:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProcurementAction"

    ActionIntent:
      type: object
      required: [type, summary]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          examples:
            - git.pull_request.create
            - deploy.release
            - cloud.resource.mutate
            - email.send
            - calendar.event.create
            - payment.charge
            - procurement.request.submit
        summary:
          type: string
        justification:
          type: string
        target:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionTarget"
        domain:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DomainAction"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    IntentContext:
      type: object
      properties:
        environment:
          type: string
          examples: [development, staging, production]
        source_platform:
          type: string
          examples: [openclaw, claude_code, codex, openhands, goose, cline, continue, langgraph, custom]
        source_session_id:
          type: string
        source_trace_id:
          type: string
        ip_address:
          type: string
        risk_hints:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        user_present:
          type: boolean
        temporary_grant_id:
          type: string

    CreateIntentRequest:
      type: object
      required: [idempotency_key, agent_id, workspace_id, action]
      properties:
        idempotency_key:
          type: string
        agent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"

    EvidenceItem:
      type: object
      required: [type, value]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [text, link, diff_summary, screenshot_ref, receipt_ref, test_result, change_ticket, artifact_ref, custom]
        label:
          type: string
        value:
          type: string

    AppendEvidenceRequest:
      type: object
      required: [evidence]
      properties:
        evidence:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/EvidenceItem"

    PolicyMatch:
      type: object
      properties:
        policy_id: { type: string }
        policy_version: { type: integer }
        rule_id: { type: string }
        explanation: { type: string }

    Decision:
      type: object
      required: [disposition, risk_level]
      properties:
        disposition:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DecisionDisposition"
        risk_level:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/RiskLevel"
        matched_policies:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyMatch"
        requires_approval:
          type: boolean
        approval_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        execution_grant_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        denial_reason:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    IntentEnvelope:
      type: object
      required: [intent_id, status, workspace_id, agent, action, decision, created_at, updated_at]
      properties:
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        agent:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActorRef"
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"
        decision:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Decision"
        evidence:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/EvidenceItem"
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    IntentListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ApprovalActor:
      type: object
      required: [principal_id]
      properties:
        principal_id:
          type: string
        display_name:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [pending, approved, denied, delegated]

    Approval:
      type: object
      required: [approval_id, intent_id, status, requested_at, approvers]
      properties:
        approval_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalStatus"
        rationale:
          type: string
        approvers:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalActor"
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        requested_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        resolved_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        editable_bounds:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ApprovalListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Approval"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ApproveRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        comment:
          type: string
        approve_once:
          type: boolean
          default: false
        step_up_auth_assertion:
          type: string

    DenyRequest:
      type: object
      required: [reason]
      properties:
        reason:
          type: string
        comment:
          type: string

    ModifyApprovalRequest:
      type: object
      required: [modifications]
      properties:
        comment:
          type: string
        modifications:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ApprovalActionResponse:
      type: object
      required: [approval_id, status]
      properties:
        approval_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalStatus"
        intent_status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        execution_grant_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    PolicyCondition:
      type: object
      properties:
        field:
          type: string
        operator:
          type: string
          enum: [eq, neq, in, not_in, gt, gte, lt, lte, contains, matches]
        value:
          oneOf:
            - type: string
            - type: number
            - type: integer
            - type: boolean
            - type: array
              items: {}

    ApprovalRequirement:
      type: object
      properties:
        mode:
          type: string
          enum: [single, any_of_group, all_of_group, quorum]
        approver_group_id:
          type: string
        quorum_count:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1

    PolicyRule:
      type: object
      required: [rule_id, effect]
      properties:
        rule_id:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        conditions:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyCondition"
        effect:
          type: string
          enum: [allow, deny, require_approval, allow_with_modification]
        approval_requirement:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalRequirement"
        modifications_template:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        priority:
          type: integer
          default: 100

    Policy:
      type: object
      required: [policy_id, name, workspace_id, status, version, rules]
      properties:
        policy_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyStatus"
        version:
          type: integer
        rules:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyRule"
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    CreatePolicyRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, name, rules]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyStatus"
        rules:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyRule"

    UpdatePolicyRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyStatus"
        rules:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyRule"

    PolicyListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Policy"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    PolicySimulationRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, action]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"

    PolicySimulationResponse:
      type: object
      required: [decision]
      properties:
        decision:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Decision"

    ConnectorAuth:
      type: object
      required: [method]
      properties:
        method:
          type: string
          enum: [oauth2, api_key_ref, service_account_ref, webhook_secret_ref, custom]
        reference_id:
          type: string
        scopes:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    Connector:
      type: object
      required: [connector_id, workspace_id, type, name, status]
      properties:
        connector_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorType"
        name:
          type: string
        provider:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, disabled, error]
        environment:
          type: string
        auth:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorAuth"
        policy_ids:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CreateConnectorRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, type, name, auth]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorType"
        name:
          type: string
        provider:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        auth:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorAuth"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    UpdateConnectorRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, disabled]
        auth:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorAuth"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ConnectorListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Connector"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ExecutionGrant:
      type: object
      required: [grant_id, intent_id, status, expires_at]
      properties:
        grant_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        connector_id:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, consumed, revoked, expired]
        bounded_parameters:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    ExecutionRunRequest:
      type: object
      required: [grant_id]
      properties:
        grant_id:
          type: string
        override_parameters:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ExecutionRunResponse:
      type: object
      required: [execution_id, status]
      properties:
        execution_id:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [accepted, running]
        accepted_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Execution:
      type: object
      required: [execution_id, intent_id, status, started_at]
      properties:
        execution_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        connector_id:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [accepted, running, succeeded, failed, cancelled]
        output:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        receipt_ref:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        started_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        finished_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true

    ExecutionCallbackRequest:
      type: object
      required: [status]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [running, succeeded, failed, cancelled]
        output:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        receipt_ref:
          type: string
        error_message:
          type: string

    FundingSource:
      type: object
      required: [funding_source_id, workspace_id, type, name, status]
      properties:
        funding_source_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card_pool, budget, fiat_account_ref, lightning_wallet_ref, btc_wallet_ref, stored_balance]
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, disabled]
        currency:
          type: string
        spending_controls:
          type: object
          properties:
            max_single_transaction:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
            allowed_merchants:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            allowed_categories:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CreateFundingSourceRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, type, name]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card_pool, budget, fiat_account_ref, lightning_wallet_ref, btc_wallet_ref, stored_balance]
        name:
          type: string
        currency:
          type: string
        spending_controls:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    FundingSourceListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/FundingSource"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    CredentialReference:
      type: object
      required: [credential_id, workspace_id, type, name, vault_path]
      properties:
        credential_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [api_key, oauth_refresh_token, service_account, webhook_secret, custom]
        name:
          type: string
        vault_path:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CreateCredentialRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, type, name, vault_path]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [api_key, oauth_refresh_token, service_account, webhook_secret, custom]
        name:
          type: string
        vault_path:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CredentialListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CredentialReference"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    TraceEvent:
      type: object
      required: [event_id, event_type, actor, timestamp]
      properties:
        event_id:
          type: string
        event_type:
          type: string
        actor:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActorRef"
        payload:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Trace:
      type: object
      required: [trace_id, intent_id, events]
      properties:
        trace_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        events:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/TraceEvent"

    TraceListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Trace"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    AnalyticsSummary:
      type: object
      properties:
        totals:
          type: object
          properties:
            intents: { type: integer }
            approvals_requested: { type: integer }
            approvals_granted: { type: integer }
            denials: { type: integer }
            executions_succeeded: { type: integer }
            executions_failed: { type: integer }
        spend:
          type: object
          properties:
            total_minor_units: { type: integer }
            currency: { type: string }
        approval_latency_ms:
          type: object
          properties:
            p50: { type: integer }
            p95: { type: integer }
        by_risk_level:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: integer
