components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT

  parameters:
    IntentId:
      name: intent_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ApprovalId:
      name: approval_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PolicyId:
      name: policy_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ConnectorId:
      name: connector_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    GrantId:
      name: grant_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ExecutionId:
      name: execution_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PageSize:
      name: page_size
      in: query
      schema:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 200
        default: 50
    PageToken:
      name: page_token
      in: query
      schema:
        type: string

  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Invalid request
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Unauthorized:
      description: Missing or invalid authentication
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Forbidden:
      description: Insufficient permissions
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Conflict:
      description: Conflict with current resource state
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"

  schemas:
    HealthResponse:
      type: object
      required: [status, service, version, timestamp]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [ok, degraded, down]
        service:
          type: string
        version:
          type: string
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Error:
      type: object
      required: [error]
      properties:
        error:
          type: object
          required: [code, message]
          properties:
            code: { type: string }
            message: { type: string }
            details:
              type: array
              items:
                type: object
                additionalProperties: true
            request_id: { type: string }

    Pagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        next_page_token:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    IntentStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending_policy, pending_approval, approved, denied, executing, succeeded, failed, cancelled, expired]

    ApprovalStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending, approved, denied, modified, delegated, expired, cancelled]

    PolicyStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [draft, active, archived]

    ConnectorType:
      type: string
      enum: [payments, source_control, cloud, deployment, email, calendar, ticketing, crm, erp, secret_manager, internal_api, custom]

    RiskLevel:
      type: string
      enum: [low, medium, high, critical]

    DecisionDisposition:
      type: string
      enum: [allow, allow_modified, require_approval, deny, require_more_evidence]

    ActorRef:
      type: object
      required: [id, type]
      properties:
        id: { type: string }
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [agent, human, service, connector_runtime]
        display_name: { type: string }

    ActionTarget:
      type: object
      required: [kind]
      properties:
        kind:
          type: string
          enum: [vendor, repository, environment, api, secret, calendar, email_recipient, ticket, cloud_resource, custom]
        id: { type: string }
        display_name: { type: string }

    Money:
      type: object
      required: [amount, currency]
      properties:
        amount:
          type: integer
          description: Amount in minor units
          minimum: 0
        currency:
          type: string
          minLength: 3
          maxLength: 3

    Recipient:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email

    AttachmentRef:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        mime_type: { type: string }
        url: { type: string, format: uri }
        storage_ref: { type: string }

    CalendarAttendee:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        optional:
          type: boolean
          default: false

    LineItem:
      type: object
      required: [description, quantity, unit_amount]
      properties:
        description:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
        unit_amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        sku:
          type: string

    GitAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [github, gitlab, bitbucket, custom]
        repository:
          type: string
        branch:
          type: string
        base_branch:
          type: string
        commit_shas:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        files_changed:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        pr_title:
          type: string
        pr_body:
          type: string
        labels:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        reviewers:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        checks_required:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    DeployAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [kubernetes, vercel, netlify, aws, gcp, azure, flyio, custom]
        service:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        artifact_ref:
          type: string
        image_ref:
          type: string
        cluster:
          type: string
        namespace:
          type: string
        strategy:
          type: string
          enum: [rolling, blue_green, canary, replace, custom]
        rollback_supported:
          type: boolean
        change_ticket_id:
          type: string
        maintenance_window_id:
          type: string

    CloudAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [aws, gcp, azure, cloudflare, custom]
        account_id:
          type: string
        region:
          type: string
        resource_type:
          type: string
        resource_id:
          type: string
        operation:
          type: string
        estimated_cost:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        tags:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: string

    EmailAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        from:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        to:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        cc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        bcc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        subject:
          type: string
        body_text:
          type: string
        body_html:
          type: string
        attachments:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/AttachmentRef"
        thread_ref:
          type: string
        send_mode:
          type: string
          enum: [send_now, draft_only]

    CalendarAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [google_calendar, outlook, custom]
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        attendees:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAttendee"
        start_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        end_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        timezone:
          type: string
        location:
          type: string
        conference_type:
          type: string
          enum: [none, google_meet, zoom, teams, custom]
        calendar_id:
          type: string
        visibility:
          type: string
          enum: [default, public, private]

    PaymentBeneficiary:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        department: { type: string }

    PaymentAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        vendor_id:
          type: string
        amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        merchant_category:
          type: string
        budget_code:
          type: string
        funding_source_id:
          type: string
        payment_instrument_preference:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card, ach, wallet, network_proxy, unspecified]
        beneficiary:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentBeneficiary"
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"
        renewal:
          type: boolean
        contract_term:
          type: string
        recurring_interval:
          type: string
          enum: [none, monthly, quarterly, annual]
        merchant_reference:
          type: string

    ProcurementAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        request_type:
          type: string
          enum: [software, travel, equipment, contractor, services, other]
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        amount_estimate:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        justification:
          type: string
        requestor:
          type: string
        cost_center:
          type: string
        legal_review_required:
          type: boolean
        security_review_required:
          type: boolean
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"

    DomainAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        git:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/GitAction"
        deploy:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeployAction"
        cloud:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CloudAction"
        email:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/EmailAction"
        calendar:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAction"
        payment:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentAction"
        procurement:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProcurementAction"

    ActionIntent:
      type: object
      required: [type, summary]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          examples:
            - git.pull_request.create
            - deploy.release
            - cloud.resource.mutate
            - email.send
            - calendar.event.create
            - payment.charge
            - procurement.request.submit
        summary:
          type: string
        justification:
          type: string
        target:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionTarget"
        domain:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DomainAction"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    IntentContext:
      type: object
      properties:
        environment:
          type: string
          examples: [development, staging, production]
        source_platform:
          type: string
          examples: [openclaw, claude_code, codex, openhands, goose, cline, continue, langgraph, custom]
        source_session_id:
          type: string
        source_trace_id:
          type: string
        ip_address:
          type: string
        risk_hints:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        user_present:
          type: boolean
        temporary_grant_id:
          type: string

    CreateIntentRequest:
      type: object
      required: [idempotency_key, agent_id, workspace_id, action]
      properties:
        idempotency_key:
          type: string
        agent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"

    EvidenceItem:
      type: object
      required: [type, value]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [text, link, diff_summary, screenshot_ref, receipt_ref, test_result, change_ticket, artifact_ref, custom]
        label:
          type: string
        value:
          type: string

    AppendEvidenceRequest:
      type: object
      required: [evidence]
      properties:
        evidence:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/EvidenceItem"

    PolicyMatch:
      type: object
      properties:
        policy_id: { type: string }
        policy_version: { type: integer }
        rule_id: { type: string }
        explanation: { type: string }

    Decision:
      type: object
      required: [disposition, risk_level]
      properties:
        disposition:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DecisionDisposition"
        risk_level:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/RiskLevel"
        matched_policies:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyMatch"
        requires_approval:
          type: boolean
        approval_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        execution_grant_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        denial_reason:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    IntentEnvelope:
      type: object
      required: [intent_id, status, workspace_id, agent, action, decision, created_at, updated_at]
      properties:
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        agent:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActorRef"
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"
        decision:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Decision"
        evidence:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/EvidenceItem"
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    IntentListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ApprovalActor:
      type: object
      required: [principal_id]
      properties:
        principal_id:
          type: string
        display_name:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [pending, approved, denied, delegated]

    Approval:
      type: object
      required: [approval_id, intent_id, status, requested_at, approvers]
      properties:
        approval_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalStatus"
        rationale:
          type: string
        approvers:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalActor"
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        requested_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        resolved_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        editable_bounds:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ApprovalListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Approval"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ApproveRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        comment:
          type: string
        approve_once:
          type: boolean
          default: false
        step_up_auth_assertion:
          type: string

    DenyRequest:
      type: object
      required: [reason]
      properties:
        reason:
          type: string
        comment:
          type: string

    ModifyApprovalRequest:
      type: object
      required: [modifications]
      properties:
        comment:
          type: string
        modifications:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ApprovalActionResponse:
      type: object
      required: [approval_id, status]
      properties:
        approval_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalStatus"
        intent_status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        execution_grant_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    PolicyCondition:
      type: object
      properties:
        field:
          type: string
        operator:
          type: string
          enum: [eq, neq, in, not_in, gt, gte, lt, lte, contains, matches]
        value:
          oneOf:
            - type: string
            - type: number
            - type: integer
            - type: boolean
            - type: array
              items: {}

    ApprovalRequirement:
      type: object
      properties:
        mode:
          type: string
          enum: [single, any_of_group, all_of_group, quorum]
        approver_group_id:
          type: string
        quorum_count:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1

    PolicyRule:
      type: object
      required: [rule_id, effect]
      properties:
        rule_id:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        conditions:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyCondition"
        effect:
          type: string
          enum: [allow, deny, require_approval, allow_with_modification]
        approval_requirement:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalRequirement"
        modifications_template:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        priority:
          type: integer
          default: 100

    Policy:
      type: object
      required: [policy_id, name, workspace_id, status, version, rules]
      properties:
        policy_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyStatus"
        version:
          type: integer
        rules:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyRule"
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    CreatePolicyRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, name, rules]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyStatus"
        rules:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyRule"

    UpdatePolicyRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyStatus"
        rules:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyRule"

    PolicyListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Policy"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    PolicySimulationRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, action]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"

    PolicySimulationResponse:
      type: object
      required: [decision]
      properties:
        decision:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Decision"

    ConnectorAuth:
      type: object
      required: [method]
      properties:
        method:
          type: string
          enum: [oauth2, api_key_ref, service_account_ref, webhook_secret_ref, custom]
        reference_id:
          type: string
        scopes:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    Connector:
      type: object
      required: [connector_id, workspace_id, type, name, status]
      properties:
        connector_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorType"
        name:
          type: string
        provider:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, disabled, error]
        environment:
          type: string
        auth:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorAuth"
        policy_ids:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CreateConnectorRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, type, name, auth]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorType"
        name:
          type: string
        provider:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        auth:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorAuth"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    UpdateConnectorRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, disabled]
        auth:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorAuth"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ConnectorListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Connector"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ExecutionGrant:
      type: object
      required: [grant_id, intent_id, status, expires_at]
      properties:
        grant_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        connector_id:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, consumed, revoked, expired]
        bounded_parameters:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    ExecutionRunRequest:
      type: object
      required: [grant_id]
      properties:
        grant_id:
          type: string
        override_parameters:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ExecutionRunResponse:
      type: object
      required: [execution_id, status]
      properties:
        execution_id:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [accepted, running]
        accepted_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Execution:
      type: object
      required: [execution_id, intent_id, status, started_at]
      properties:
        execution_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        connector_id:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [accepted, running, succeeded, failed, cancelled]
        output:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        receipt_ref:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        started_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        finished_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true

    ExecutionCallbackRequest:
      type: object
      required: [status]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [running, succeeded, failed, cancelled]
        output:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        receipt_ref:
          type: string
        error_message:
          type: string

    FundingSource:
      type: object
      required: [funding_source_id, workspace_id, type, name, status]
      properties:
        funding_source_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card_pool, budget, fiat_account_ref, lightning_wallet_ref, btc_wallet_ref, stored_balance]
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, disabled]
        currency:
          type: string
        spending_controls:
          type: object
          properties:
            max_single_transaction:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
            allowed_merchants:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            allowed_categories:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CreateFundingSourceRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, type, name]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card_pool, budget, fiat_account_ref, lightning_wallet_ref, btc_wallet_ref, stored_balance]
        name:
          type: string
        currency:
          type: string
        spending_controls:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    FundingSourceListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/FundingSource"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    CredentialReference:
      type: object
      required: [credential_id, workspace_id, type, name, vault_path]
      properties:
        credential_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [api_key, oauth_refresh_token, service_account, webhook_secret, custom]
        name:
          type: string
        vault_path:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CreateCredentialRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, type, name, vault_path]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [api_key, oauth_refresh_token, service_account, webhook_secret, custom]
        name:
          type: string
        vault_path:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CredentialListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CredentialReference"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    TraceEvent:
      type: object
      required: [event_id, event_type, actor, timestamp]
      properties:
        event_id:
          type: string
        event_type:
          type: string
        actor:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActorRef"
        payload:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Trace:
      type: object
      required: [trace_id, intent_id, events]
      properties:
        trace_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        events:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/TraceEvent"

    TraceListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Trace"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    AnalyticsSummary:
      type: object
      properties:
        totals:
          type: object
          properties:
            intents: { type: integer }
            approvals_requested: { type: integer }
            approvals_granted: { type: integer }
            denials: { type: integer }
            executions_succeeded: { type: integer }
            executions_failed: { type: integer }
        spend:
          type: object
          properties:
            total_minor_units: { type: integer }
            currency: { type: string }
        approval_latency_ms:
          type: object
          properties:
            p50: { type: integer }
            p95: { type: integer }
        by_risk_level:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: integer

openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Agentic Control Plane API
  version: 0.2.0
  summary: Policy, approval, execution, and audit APIs for governed agent actions
  description: |
    v0.2 extends the base control-plane lifecycle with richer, domain-specific schemas for:
      - Git and pull request actions
      - Deploy and cloud actions
      - Email and calendar actions
      - Payment and procurement actions

    Core lifecycle:
      intent -> policy decision -> approval (optional) -> execution grant -> execution -> trace

servers:
  - url: https://api.agentic-control-plane.example.com
    description: Production
  - url: https://sandbox.agentic-control-plane.example.com
    description: Sandbox

security:
  - bearerAuth: []

tags:
  - name: Intents
  - name: Approvals
  - name: Policies
  - name: Connectors
  - name: Executions
  - name: Funding Sources
  - name: Credentials
  - name: Traces
  - name: Analytics
  - name: Health

paths:
  /v1/health:
    get:
      tags: [Health]
      summary: Get service health
      operationId: getHealth
      security: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Service health
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HealthResponse"

  /v1/intents:
    post:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: Submit a new action intent
      operationId: createIntent
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateIntentRequest"
            examples:
              gitPullRequest:
                summary: Create a pull request
                value:
                  idempotency_key: "REDACTED"
                  agent_id: "agt_codex_repo_alpha"
                  workspace_id: "ws_engineering"
                  action:
                    type: "git.pull_request.create"
                    summary: "Open PR from feature branch to main"
                    justification: "Ship checkout bug fix"
                    target:
                      kind: "repository"
                      id: "repo_checkout"
                      display_name: "github.com/acme/checkout"
                    domain:
                      git:
                        provider: "github"
                        repository: "acme/checkout"
                        branch: "fix/checkout-tax-rounding"
                        base_branch: "main"
                        commit_shas:
                          - "abc1234"
                        files_changed:
                          - "src/tax.ts"
                          - "tests/tax.test.ts"
                        pr_title: "Fix tax rounding on checkout"
                        pr_body: "This PR fixes checkout tax rounding and adds regression tests."
                        labels: ["bugfix", "checkout"]
                  context:
                    environment: "production"
                    source_platform: "codex"
              paymentPurchase:
                summary: Purchase SaaS subscription
                value:
                  idempotency_key: "REDACTED"
                  agent_id: "agt_procurement_ops"
                  workspace_id: "ws_finops"
                  action:
                    type: "payment.charge"
                    summary: "Purchase annual Figma license"
                    justification: "Renew expiring seat for jane@company.com"
                    target:
                      kind: "vendor"
                      id: "vendor_figma"
                      display_name: "Figma"
                    domain:
                      payment:
                        vendor_name: "Figma"
                        amount:
                          amount: 18000
                          currency: "USD"
                        merchant_category: "software"
                        budget_code: "design-software"
                        funding_source_id: "fs_team_software"
                        payment_instrument_preference: "virtual_card"
                        line_items:
                          - description: "Figma Pro Annual"
                            quantity: 1
                            unit_amount:
                              amount: 18000
                              currency: "USD"
                        beneficiary:
                          email: "jane@company.com"
                  context:
                    environment: "production"
                    source_platform: "openclaw"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Intent created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "409":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Conflict"

    get:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: List intents
      operationId: listIntents
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageSize"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageToken"
        - name: workspace_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        - name: action_type
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: agent_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Paginated intents
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentListResponse"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"

  /v1/intents/{intent_id}:
    get:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: Get an intent
      operationId: getIntent
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/IntentId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Intent details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/intents/{intent_id}/evidence:
    post:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: Attach evidence to an intent
      operationId: appendIntentEvidence
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/IntentId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/AppendEvidenceRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Evidence appended
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/approvals:
    get:
      tags: [Approvals]
      summary: List approval requests
      operationId: listApprovals
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageSize"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageToken"
        - name: workspace_id
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: assignee
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Approval queue
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalListResponse"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"

  /v1/approvals/{approval_id}:
    get:
      tags: [Approvals]
      summary: Get an approval request
      operationId: getApproval
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/ApprovalId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Approval details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Approval"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/approvals/{approval_id}/approve:
    post:
      tags: [Approvals]
      summary: Approve an action
      operationId: approveRequest
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/ApprovalId"
      requestBody:
        required: false
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApproveRequest"
      responses:
        "200":

components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT

  parameters:
    IntentId:
      name: intent_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ApprovalId:
      name: approval_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PolicyId:
      name: policy_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ConnectorId:
      name: connector_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    GrantId:
      name: grant_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ExecutionId:
      name: execution_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PageSize:
      name: page_size
      in: query
      schema:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 200
        default: 50
    PageToken:
      name: page_token
      in: query
      schema:
        type: string

  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Invalid request
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Unauthorized:
      description: Missing or invalid authentication
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Forbidden:
      description: Insufficient permissions
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Conflict:
      description: Conflict with current resource state
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"

  schemas:
    HealthResponse:
      type: object
      required: [status, service, version, timestamp]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [ok, degraded, down]
        service:
          type: string
        version:
          type: string
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Error:
      type: object
      required: [error]
      properties:
        error:
          type: object
          required: [code, message]
          properties:
            code: { type: string }
            message: { type: string }
            details:
              type: array
              items:
                type: object
                additionalProperties: true
            request_id: { type: string }

    Pagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        next_page_token:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    IntentStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending_policy, pending_approval, approved, denied, executing, succeeded, failed, cancelled, expired]

    ApprovalStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending, approved, denied, modified, delegated, expired, cancelled]

    PolicyStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [draft, active, archived]

    ConnectorType:
      type: string
      enum: [payments, source_control, cloud, deployment, email, calendar, ticketing, crm, erp, secret_manager, internal_api, custom]

    RiskLevel:
      type: string
      enum: [low, medium, high, critical]

    DecisionDisposition:
      type: string
      enum: [allow, allow_modified, require_approval, deny, require_more_evidence]

    ActorRef:
      type: object
      required: [id, type]
      properties:
        id: { type: string }
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [agent, human, service, connector_runtime]
        display_name: { type: string }

    ActionTarget:
      type: object
      required: [kind]
      properties:
        kind:
          type: string
          enum: [vendor, repository, environment, api, secret, calendar, email_recipient, ticket, cloud_resource, custom]
        id: { type: string }
        display_name: { type: string }

    Money:
      type: object
      required: [amount, currency]
      properties:
        amount:
          type: integer
          description: Amount in minor units
          minimum: 0
        currency:
          type: string
          minLength: 3
          maxLength: 3

    Recipient:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email

    AttachmentRef:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        mime_type: { type: string }
        url: { type: string, format: uri }
        storage_ref: { type: string }

    CalendarAttendee:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        optional:
          type: boolean
          default: false

    LineItem:
      type: object
      required: [description, quantity, unit_amount]
      properties:
        description:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
        unit_amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        sku:
          type: string

    GitAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [github, gitlab, bitbucket, custom]
        repository:
          type: string
        branch:
          type: string
        base_branch:
          type: string
        commit_shas:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        files_changed:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        pr_title:
          type: string
        pr_body:
          type: string
        labels:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        reviewers:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        checks_required:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    DeployAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [kubernetes, vercel, netlify, aws, gcp, azure, flyio, custom]
        service:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        artifact_ref:
          type: string
        image_ref:
          type: string
        cluster:
          type: string
        namespace:
          type: string
        strategy:
          type: string
          enum: [rolling, blue_green, canary, replace, custom]
        rollback_supported:
          type: boolean
        change_ticket_id:
          type: string
        maintenance_window_id:
          type: string

    CloudAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [aws, gcp, azure, cloudflare, custom]
        account_id:
          type: string
        region:
          type: string
        resource_type:
          type: string
        resource_id:
          type: string
        operation:
          type: string
        estimated_cost:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        tags:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: string

    EmailAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        from:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        to:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        cc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        bcc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        subject:
          type: string
        body_text:
          type: string
        body_html:
          type: string
        attachments:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/AttachmentRef"
        thread_ref:
          type: string
        send_mode:
          type: string
          enum: [send_now, draft_only]

    CalendarAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [google_calendar, outlook, custom]
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        attendees:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAttendee"
        start_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        end_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        timezone:
          type: string
        location:
          type: string
        conference_type:
          type: string
          enum: [none, google_meet, zoom, teams, custom]
        calendar_id:
          type: string
        visibility:
          type: string
          enum: [default, public, private]

    PaymentBeneficiary:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        department: { type: string }

    PaymentAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        vendor_id:
          type: string
        amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        merchant_category:
          type: string
        budget_code:
          type: string
        funding_source_id:
          type: string
        payment_instrument_preference:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card, ach, wallet, network_proxy, unspecified]
        beneficiary:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentBeneficiary"
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"
        renewal:
          type: boolean
        contract_term:
          type: string
        recurring_interval:
          type: string
          enum: [none, monthly, quarterly, annual]
        merchant_reference:
          type: string

    ProcurementAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        request_type:
          type: string
          enum: [software, travel, equipment, contractor, services, other]
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        amount_estimate:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        justification:
          type: string
        requestor:
          type: string
        cost_center:
          type: string
        legal_review_required:
          type: boolean
        security_review_required:
          type: boolean
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"

    DomainAction:
      type: object
      description: |
        Carries action-type-specific fields. Exactly one field must be populated,
        corresponding to the prefix of ActionIntent.type:
          - git.* → git
          - deploy.* → deploy
          - cloud.* → cloud
          - email.* → email
          - calendar.* → calendar
          - payment.* → payment
          - procurement.* → procurement
        The server rejects requests where the populated domain field does not
        match the action type prefix.
      minProperties: 1
      maxProperties: 1
      properties:
        git:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/GitAction"
        deploy:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeployAction"
        cloud:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CloudAction"
        email:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/EmailAction"
        calendar:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAction"
        payment:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentAction"
        procurement:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProcurementAction"

    ActionIntent:
      type: object
      required: [type, summary]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          examples:
            - git.pull_request.create
            - deploy.release
            - cloud.resource.mutate
            - email.send
            - calendar.event.create
            - payment.charge
            - procurement.request.submit
        summary:
          type: string
        justification:

content.text:
All 8 tasks completed. Here's a summary of everything that was done:

### Go Code Changes

1. **`core/model/model.go`** (new) — Shared domain types aligned with the OpenAPI spec. All 7 domain action types (Git, Deploy, Cloud, Email, Calendar, Payment, Procurement) plus `Money`, `ActorRef`, `Decision`, `EventType`, `IntentContext`, and related types.

2. **`core/policy/spi.go`** — Simplified to import shared types from `core/model` instead of defining its own duplicates. Went from 128 lines to 29.

3. **`core/audit/spi.go`** — Refactored to use `model.ActorRef`, `model.EventType`, and `model.ActorType` instead of local copies.

4. **`core/connector/spi.go`** — Added `sync.RWMutex` for concurrent safety, added `context.Context` to `Register()` and `Get()` methods.

5. **`core/server/middleware.go`** (new) — Request ID, structured request logging, and CORS middleware using stdlib `http.Handler` wrapping.

6. **`core/server/main.go`** — Wired middleware chain (CORS → request ID → logging → routes), updated `Register()` calls with context.

### OpenAPI Spec Changes

7. **Workspace scoping** — Added required `workspace_id` query parameter to 6 list endpoints (policies, connectors, funding-sources, credentials, traces, approvals).

8. **Error responses** — Defined 5 reusable error responses (400/401/403/404/409) and referenced them from all 25+ endpoints with appropriate combinations.

9. **DomainAction discriminator** — Added `minProperties: 1` / `maxProperties: 1` constraints and documentation mapping action type prefixes to domain fields.

10. **Callback URL** — Added `callback_url` field to `CreateIntentRequest` so agents can receive webhook notifications instead of polling.

 // happen in the control plane before the connector is called.
 package connector
 
-import "context"
+import (
+	"context"
+	"sync"
+)
 
 // Connector executes an approved action against an external system.
 type Connector interface {
@@ -68,7 +71,9 @@ const (
 )
 
 // Registry holds the registered connectors and routes execution requests.
+// It is safe for concurrent use.
 type Registry struct {
+	mu         sync.RWMutex
 	connectors map[string]Connector
 }
 
@@ -79,13 +84,19 @@ func NewRegistry() *Registry {
 
 // Register adds a connector to the registry.
 // The key is "<type>/<provider>", e.g. "payments/stripe".
-func (r *Registry) Register(c Connector) {
+func (r *Registry) Register(ctx context.Context, c Connector) {
+	_ = ctx // available for future database-backed implementations
 	key := c.Type() + "/" + c.Provider()
+	r.mu.Lock()
 	r.connectors[key] = c
+	r.mu.Unlock()
 }
 
 // Get returns the connector for the given type and provider.
-func (r *Registry) Get(connectorType, provider string) (Connector, bool) {
+func (r *Registry) Get(ctx context.Context, connectorType, provider string) (Connector, bool) {
+	_ = ctx // available for future database-backed implementations
+	r.mu.RLock()
 	c, ok := r.connectors[connectorType+"/"+provider]
+	r.mu.RUnlock()
 	return c, ok
 }

+func (r *Registry) Register(ctx context.Context, c Connector) {
+	_ = ctx // available for future database-backed implementations

+	r.mu.Lock()

+	r.mu.Unlock()

+func (r *Registry) Get(ctx context.Context, connectorType, provider string) (Connector, bool) {
+	_ = ctx // available for future database-backed implementations

+	r.mu.RUnlock()
 	return c, ok
 }

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
refactor: align Go types with OpenAPI spec and harden API surface

Extract shared domain types into core/model package with all 7 domain
action types (git, deploy, cloud, email, calendar, payment, procurement)
matching the OpenAPI spec. Refactor policy and audit SPIs to import from
core/model instead of defining duplicate types.

Add concurrency safety (sync.RWMutex) and context.Context to the
connector registry. Add HTTP middleware chain (request ID, structured
logging, CORS) to the server.

Harden the OpenAPI spec: add workspace_id scoping to all list endpoints,
add error responses (400/401/403/404/409) to all endpoints, enforce
exactly-one domain field via minProperties/maxProperties, and add
callback_url to CreateIntentRequest for webhook-based progress
notifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
